metadata.title: Next.js App
metadata.description: A luxury minimalist Next.js application with internationalization

welcome: Welcome to a Luxury Minimalist Experience

homepage.brandStory: Your ultimate destination for skateboarding gear, community, and culture in Israel. Discover the best skateparks, connect with trainers, and find everything you need to take your skills to the next level.
homepage.newsletterDescription: Subscribe to our newsletter to receive the latest updates, new product launches, and exclusive offers.
homepage.newsletterPrivacy: We respect your privacy. Unsubscribe at any time.
homepage.heroSubtitle: Join thousands discovering the thrill of skateparks. Connect with your community, share your passion, and inspire the next generation of riders.
homepage.whyEnbossSubtitle: We're building more than an app. We're building a movement around the joy and community of skateparks.
homepage.featureDiscoverDesc: Find skateparks you never knew existed. From street spots to professional parks, explore the world of skating like never before.
homepage.featureBuildDesc: Connect with riders who share your passion. Share tips, organize sessions, and grow the skating community together.
homepage.featureRateDesc: Help others find their perfect spot. Share your experiences, photos, and insights about every park you visit.
homepage.featureTrackDesc: Document your journey. Keep track of parks visited, tricks learned, and memories made along the way.
homepage.featurePlanDesc: Know before you go. Check opening hours, amenities, difficulty levels, and what other riders are saying.
homepage.featureSpreadDesc: Introduce people to the world of skateparks. Share your passion and help grow the sport you love.
homepage.togetherWeRideSubtitle: Real riders. Real parks. Real community.
homepage.footerTagline: Spreading the joy of skateparks worldwide.

account.accountOverview: Here's what's happening with your account

footer.newsletterDescription: Get tips, technical guides, and best practices. Twice a month.
footer.newsletterDescriptionNew: Get the latest parks, events, and exclusive deals.
footer.subscribeError: Something went wrong. Please try again.
footer.brandTagline: Feel the Joy. Find Your Park.
footer.missionStatement:
The home your wheels deserve. 
ENBOSS is the network for Israel’s wheel sports community. Discover, connect, and progress.
Because no rider should be left behind.
footer.builtByRiders: Built by riders. For riders. Together we ride.

cookieConsent.title: We use cookies
cookieConsent.functionalConsentMessage: Please enable functional cookies in your cookie preferences to use theme and language settings.
cookieConsent.description: By clicking 'Accept All', you consent to our use of cookies.

settings.title: Cookie Preferences
settings.description: Manage your cookie preferences. You can enable or disable different types of cookies below.

essential.title: Essential Cookies
essential.description: These cookies are necessary for the website to function and cannot be switched off.

analytics.title: Analytics Cookies
analytics.description: These cookies help us understand how visitors interact with our website by collecting and reporting information anonymously.

functional.title: Functional Cookies
functional.description: These cookies and local storage enable essential functionality and personalization, such as remembering your language and theme. We also use local storage to cache data to improve loading and search.

examples.contentCache: Local storage to cache data to improve loading and search

ilBanner.textBeforeLink: We use cookies to enhance your browsing experience, personalize content, and analyze our traffic.

mobileNav.togetherWeRide: Together we ride. Together we grow.
mobileNav.growthLabDesc: Share your thoughts and help the community grow
